      • isResponsible

        public boolean isResponsible(Operator op,
                    Term[] subs,
                    Services services,
                    ExecutionContext ec)
        Description copied from class: LDT
        returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the logic subterms
        Specified by:
        isResponsible in class LDT
        Parameters:
        op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate
        subs - the logic subterms of the java operator
        services - the Services
        ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
        Returns:
        true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterms

        Specified by:
        isResponsible in class LDT
        Parameters:
        op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate

        right - the right subterm of the java operator
        services - the Services
        ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
        Returns:
        true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterms

        sub - the logic subterms of the java operator

        Returns:
